message:
test(bd-1cd5): cover Root/Content constructor methods in types.rs

Add 13 tests for previously untested convenience constructors:
- Root::new() and Root::with_name() (4 tests)
- Content::text() (2 tests)
- Content::image_base64(), Content::audio_base64() (2 tests)
- Content::resource_text() with/without mime (2 tests)
- Content::resource_blob_base64() with/without mime (2 tests)
- Content::text() from owned String (1 test)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
